# bio-spatial-transcriptomics-fastq2spatial
# This skill wraps command-line tools; no Python/R packages required.
# Install the following tools independently:
#
# Option 1: Space Ranger
#   Download from: https://www.10xgenomics.com/support/software/space-ranger
#   Requires: Linux x86_64, 64GB+ RAM recommended
#
# Option 2: Spacemake
#   Install via pip: pip install spacemake
#   Or via conda: conda install -c bioconda spacemake
#   Dependencies: snakemake, STAR, samtools
#   Requires: Linux/macOS, 64GB+ RAM recommended
#
# Optional:
#   Loupe Browser: https://www.10xgenomics.com/support/software/loupe-browser
#     (for manual fiducial alignment when automatic alignment fails)
